response.overview: This 4-DVD set discusses the intranational conflicts in Lebanon since its founding in 1943 as an independent state and how these internal conflicts led Lebanon to fall into a spiral of violence amongst its own people and with their neighbors. If you are fascinated by Middle Eastern and/or Lebanese history, then this set is for you. This 15-part series is in Arabic with English subtitles. Overall comprehensive, the subtitles are, from time to time, ludicrously pompous and incoherent, but anyone with a general knowledge on the subject or who is mildly good at deciphering puzzles will understand readily what the editor is trying to say.
response.title: The War for Lebanon
